sources.title: The Empty Acre Dvdrip Xvid
sources.description: Invisible force preys on Kansas farming town, luring couple's baby from barren acre. Horror chronicling parents' turmoil after mysterious entity abducts infant.

metadata.Plot: Set in rural, Kansas, "The Empty Acre" is a dramatic horror film about an unseen force that feeds on a small farming community. The invisible entity reaches out from a lifeless acre of land on a young farm couple's property. One late summer night, the unsuspecting couple's baby is taken by the ominous being.
metadata.Actors: Jennifer Plas, John Wilson, Robert Paisley
